chat_log.content:
Looking at your profile, we're still in the intake interview. I have your email set up, but the core sections — your background, what you're building, your goals — are all blank. Let's fix that.

Before we do anything else, I want to spend about 30 minutes getting an accurate picture of where you actually are. Not the elevator pitch version, the honest one. I'll ask about your background, what you're building, and what you actually want. From that I'll build a profile that shapes how I coach you. There are no right answers. The less polished your answers are, the more useful this will be.

Let's start with your background.

What did you do before this? Not the LinkedIn version — what did the work actually involve, and how long did you do it?
